Music born in the family

About us

Music that brings joy, warmth, and life to your event
We are a Ukrainian family music band from Split — a dad, a mom, and two talented daughters. For three years, we’ve been creating joyful and heartfelt atmospheres at events of all kinds — from intimate family gatherings to large celebrations.

Our repertoire:

  • Fun, popular hits
  • Light jazz and soulful melodies
  • Beloved classics with a fresh, heartfelt twist

Video-gallery

Go Daddy O! It don't mean a thing Sing Sing Sing

Special offer

for smaller venues

Special Offer from Sunny Family Band – Solo Program by Natali

Looking for the perfect musical touch for your cozy bar, intimate restaurant, stylish café, or a private event? Sunny Family Band presents a special solo program by Natali – an elegant and soulful experience tailored for venues where a full band might be too much, but the atmosphere still calls for something magical.
Lounge Saxophone Program by Daria

Perfect live music for intimate events & elegant venues.

Looking for music that sets the perfect mood — smooth, stylish, and sophisticated — without overpowering the atmosphere?
Meet Daria, the youn member of Sunny Family Band, whose saxophone performance will surprise you with its maturity and quality.
